title: 3.2.5 Release: Editing, Cleanup, and Desktop Updates

changes.message: Direct Windows installs can now update in-app, while Microsoft Store installs continue updating through the Store.
Deleting and clearing items is faster and safer, with new hover targets, keyboard shortcuts, bulk clear actions, and undo support.
Custom circles and rectangles are easier to resize and now save more reliably in existing strategies.
Deadlock Barrier Mesh can now be edited directly, and wall-style abilities start with better default sizing.
Drawing tools now support per-element stroke thickness, smoother line workflows, and better drag and resize behavior.
Text editing is more reliable, with drafts and in-progress changes preserved more consistently.
Older strategy files, screenshots, and saved data now load and migrate more safely.
Release and update delivery has been cleaned up behind the scenes for both desktop and Microsoft Store builds.
